summary: Live-applied ADR 0244 by restoring the governed runtime assurance matrix through the authenticated API gateway and the interactive ops portal, while hardening the live sync path against unreadable receipt sidecars and the missing gateway helper-module packaging gap.

verification.check: Runtime assurance and repository validation gates
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema --with nats-py==2.11.0 python3 scripts/runtime_assurance.py --validate --print-report-json`, `PYTHON_BIN=/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 uvx --from pyyaml python scripts/ansible_scope_runner.py validate`, `make syntax-check-api-gateway`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` all passed from the isolated worktree.

On `docker-runtime-lv3`, `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8083/healthz` returned `{"status":"ok"}`, the running container exposed `@app.get("/v1/platform/runtime-assurance")`, and the authenticated `GET /v1/platform/runtime-assurance` call returned `HTTP 200` with `45` bindings (`7` pass / `38` degraded).

`curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8092/health` returned `{"status":"ok"}`, `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8092/partials/overview` returned the governed overview markers, and `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8092/partials/runtime-assurance` rendered the `45`-binding summary without the degraded-data banner once the gateway route and portal receipt loading were fixed.
`curl -k -I https://ops.lv3.org` returned `HTTP 302` to `https://ops.lv3.org/oauth2/sign_in?rd=https://ops.lv3.org/` and preserved the expected hardening headers after the live replay.

The outer `make converge-ops-portal` and `make syntax-check-ops-portal` paths still received local `143` / `SIGTERM 15` behavior from the Codex execution environment before completion. The targeted validation slices, role tests, and guest-local live replay all succeeded, so this receipt records the wrapper limitation explicitly instead of treating it as a platform regression.

notes: The deployable sources in commit `f26cbb8cf63e292e0a65ebb619acef7aa3c4393f` match the verified guest state; this receipt commit records branch-local evidence and merge-safe metadata on top of that code commit.

The live replay corrected concurrent drift on the guest by restoring the portal build-context usage, copying the missing gateway `runtime_assurance.py` helper into the service image, and deleting stale macOS metadata sidecars from the live trees.

Protected integration files still waiting for the exact-main merge step are `README.md`, `VERSION`, the release sections in `changelog.md`, the next release note, `versions/stack.yaml`, and `build/platform-manifest.json`.
